title: AN ACT AMENDING PROJECT NUMBERED B-421.39 PAGE SIX HUNDRED EIGHTY-A, OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6295 / 53 OG No. 17, 5512 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1755, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT AMENDING PROJECT NUMBERED B-421.39 PAGE SIX HUNDRED EIGHTY-A, OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Project numbered B-421.39, page six hundred eighty-A, of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen is hereby amended to read as follows:

"B-421.39, Remedios Suspension Bridge, Mauban ............................ P 3,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
